canonical_nt.summary: Named NT defect tranche is complete and guarded.

canonical_ot.summary: Canonical OT has source-backed NABRE overlay remediation and classified residuals, but remains not globally trusted.

psalms.summary: Psalms are a governed 155-record legacy psalter subsystem and remain not textually trusted.

deuterocanon.summary: DRB/NABRE source tranches are applied where controlled; Greek books and 3/4 Maccabees remain unresolved/governed.

broader_canon.summary: Broader canon raw-text corpus is governed but not source-adjudicated or textually trusted.

vulgate.summary: Vulgate lane remains excluded active work with protected dirty files.
